Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This will completely break the Validation Service by preventing the SSL keystore from being opened. The KEY_STORE_PASSWORD is required to successfully open the keystore for the server certificate, and also provides the default password for the keystore for trusting the Schema Ingestion service.
The DKEY_STORE_PASSWORD must be read in from the Docker environment. It cannot be set to an empty value (overriding any configuration settings)!

Patch Set 2:

> This will completely break the Validation Service by preventing the
 > SSL keystore from being opened. The KEY_STORE_PASSWORD is required
 > to successfully open the keystore for the server certificate, and
 > also provides the default password for the keystore for trusting
 > the Schema Ingestion service.
 > The DKEY_STORE_PASSWORD must be read in from the Docker
 > environment. It cannot be set to an empty value (overriding any
 > configuration settings)!

In order to allow reading this setting from docker/container environment the corresponding code that reads the value should be changed from System.getProperty to System.getenv. Current implementation requires that this parameter is provided as a JVM argument 
Please advise if you consider modifying it ?

Patch Set 2:

We can deal with KEY_STORE_PASSWORD in the same way as APP_HOME. I don't know of any reason for changing this pattern.
a) read from the env (but provide a default)
b) pass the value to the JVM as a System Property with -D
